title: eucalyptus gunnii subsp. divaricata
intro: Eucalyptus gunnii subsp. divaricata, also known as the Silver Dollar Eucalyptus, is a subspecies of eucalyptus tree native to New South Wales, Australia. This plant is known for its aromatic and medicinal properties, with a high concentration of eucalyptol, a compound responsible for its decongestant and anti-inflammatory effects. The medicinal properties of Eucalyptus gunnii subsp. divaricata have been used to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as to reduce fever and soothe sore muscles and joints. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be made into tea, infused in oil for topical use, or added to salves and creams to harness its health benefits.
